generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) on Axis1 of MABI MAX 100 serial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentMQTT
]
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑side position encoder measuring motor angular position (θ_M) on Axis1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionMQTT
]
instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox‑side position encoder measuring gearwheel angular position (θ_G) on Axis1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionMQTT
]

instance MotorCurrentMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]
instance MotorPositionMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]
instance GearboxPositionMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor current (I_M) received from MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT
]
instance MotorPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor angular position (θ_M) received from MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionMQTT
]
instance GearboxPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of gearwheel angular position (θ_G) received from MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionMQTT
]

instance MotorSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the motor for real‑time simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance GearwheelSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearwheel in the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance GearboxSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the entire gearbox for real‑time simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance TorqueDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics equations for torque and acceleration of Axis 1 components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance MotorTorqueSimData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque output from MATLAB model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTrace
]
instance GearwheelTorqueSimData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel torque output from MATLAB/Simulink gearwheel model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionTrace
]
instance GearboxTorqueSimData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque output from MATLAB/Simulink gearbox model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionTrace
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Coordinated execution of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSimulationService
]
instance FrictionIdentificationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Management of real‑time friction identification using white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provision of unified dashboard visualization of motor and joint dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance CNCSupportEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Injection of updated friction parameters into Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables CNCSupportService
]

instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time simulation service that runs motor, gearwheel, and gearbox models based on current sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing real‑time friction identification integrating white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight, WearDiagnosticsInsight
]
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that visualizes motor, gearwheel, and joint dynamics in a web‑based dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]
instance CNCSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering updated friction parameters to the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides InjectFrictionParamsAction
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Resulting simulation output for analysis and validation"
]
instance UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction parameters for controller tuning"
]
instance WearDiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostics of wear or tool changes inferred from friction estimation"
]
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Potential improvements in motion accuracy derived from friction modelling"
]

instance InjectFrictionParamsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Inject updated friction parameters into Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Axis1RobotComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis (Axis 1) of the MABI MAX 100 serial industrial robot comprising a permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox, two position encoders, and associated torque and speed sensors"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twin operates at real‑time, synchronizing continuously with the robot’s sampling rate. Sensor data is streamed live over MQTT and processed immediately, enabling multi‑physics‑aware identification of friction during each robot cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated twin consisting of: the asset (Axis 1), its engineering model, an Asset Administration Shell exposing configuration and metadata, a processing component that converts MQTT sensor streams into data traces, simulation modules for motor, gearwheel, and gearbox, and a dashboard that visualises all relevant signals and model outputs in real time."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin spans the manufactured and operated phases. Initial engineering models (SysML BDD/IBD) are created during manufacturing, and during operation the twin performs continuous identification and calibration of friction models, thereby covering the operated stage."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by combining analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) friction models, continuous real‑time identification during operation, and traceability of each data point back to its source. Validation is performed by comparing simulated outputs against measured reference data, and uncertainties originate from sensor noise, model parameter drift, and temperature‑dependent friction effects. The twin supports stochastic updates of friction coefficients to maintain model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑virtual communication utilizes the MQTT protocol to stream sensor data from the robot’s controller to the digital shadow processing component. The Asset Administration Shell communicates asset metadata via its standard REST/JSON interface, although details are not specified. No bidirectional network protocols are described."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows Industry 4.0 standards: SysML for engineering representation, Asset Administration Shell (ISO/IEC 30100) for asset metadata, and MQTT (ISO/IEC 20922) for communication. No specific modelling or data‑exchange standards beyond these are cited."
]
